description_long: This object is a pair of ornate, dark-toned earrings displayed on a slender metallic stand with a black square base. Each earring features a circular, gear-like motif with intricate, spiked edges and layered, concentric details, giving them a bold, industrial aesthetic. The earrings are suspended from a thin, vertical rod, allowing them to hang freely and display their symmetrical design. The surface of the earrings appears glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing their detailed craftsmanship. The overall color is a deep, metallic black, with subtle highlights that accentuate the raised and recessed areas. The stand is minimalistic, ensuring the focus remains on the elaborate jewelry pieces.
description: A pair of glossy, black, gear-motif earrings with intricate, spiked edges, displayed on a simple metallic stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earrings' full circular, gear-like faces and their symmetrical arrangement on the stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the earrings and the vertical rod supporting them.
description_view_2: Rear view with the backs of the earrings visible, showing the attachment points and the stand's structure.
description_view_3: Angled side view displaying the depth and layered details of the earrings' design.
